items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Introducing Chatgpt Futures Class Of 2026".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=Introducing ChatGPT Futures: Class of 2026 published=Wed, 06 May 2026 00:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/introducing-chatgpt-futures-class-of-2026 description=Meet the ChatGPT Futures Class of 2026—26 student innovators using AI to build, research, and drive real-world impact. Discover how this generation is redefining learning, creativity, and opportunity with ChatGPT. title=GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized published=Tue, 05 May 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-5-instant description=GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
diff_excerpt: +description=Meet the ChatGPT Futures Class of 2026—26 student innovators using AI to build, research, and drive real-world impact. Discover how this generation is redefining learning, creativity, and opportunity with ChatGPT.
title=How frontier enterprises are building an AI advantage
description=OpenAI’s B2B Signals research shows how frontier enterprises deepen AI adoption, scale Codex-powered agentic workflows, and build durable competitive advantage.
+title=GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
+description=GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
title=Unlocking large scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection)
-title=GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
-description=GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
title=New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
description=Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity. Sam Altman shares five principles that guide our work.
-description=Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
